name: Chicken Braised with 40 Cloves of Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil and peel the garlic cloves.
2. Skim the chicken if desired.
3. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Place all ingredients in a deep, heavy pot that can be covered.
5. Combine everything thoroughly with your hands.
6. Seal the pot tightly with foil.
7. Cover the foil and place the cover on the pot.
8. Ensure the pot is well sealed so no juices or steam escape.
9. Bake for 1 1/2 hours without opening the pot.
10. Serve piping hot with crusty bread to mop up the juices and garlic.
11. Open the pot at the table for diners to enjoy the aroma.
